name: git
description: git — pure git plumbing commands that aren't tied to code logic. `/cleanup` removes merged branches and worktrees with hard data-loss guards (skips anything with uncommitted changes, stashes, unmerged commits, locks, or detached HEAD). Future home for `/tag-release`, `/rebase-clean`, and other git-only workflows. The code-aware loop (`/commit`, `/review`, `/sprint`) lives in the `code` plugin.
